nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州

nodes.name: Greater thornbird
nodes.summary: Greater thornbird（Greater thornbird，学名 Phacellodomus ruber），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 科连特斯省
nodes.summary: 科连特斯省（Corrientes）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷东北部，首府為科连特斯（Corrientes）。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The greater thornbird (Phacellodomus ruber) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The greater thornbird is found in north-central and eastern Bolivia, from Bolivia east in Brazil to western Pernambuco and Bahia and south into Rio Grande do Sul, through central Paraguay into northern Argentina as far as Corrientes Province, and into western Uruguay. The species inhabits a variety of landscapes, almost always near water
